name: Langton's Ant
description: Langton's Ant cellular automaton with three independent ants on a toroidal grid. Cells accumulate heat as they are flipped, producing emergent highway patterns after thousands of steps. Heat-map palette from cool blue through yellow and red to white. Bass accelerates trail accumulation, mouse drops new ants, and depth controls viewport zoom.

params.name: Trail Intensity
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Evolution Speed
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Seed Pattern
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Trail Decay
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
